entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop with the largest global production and significant growth in area and productivity.

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where the harvested maize area grew by 2.7% from 1993 to 2013.

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A continent and the second largest maize producer, with a 31% share in global production.

entities.name: LATIN AMERICA
entities.description: A region where the harvested maize area grew by 4.6% from 1993 to 2013.

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A cereal crop whose global production was surpassed by maize in 1996.

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A cereal crop whose global production was surpassed by maize in 1997.

entities.name: SOUTHEAST ASIA
entities.description: A sub-region of Asia that showed a 10.8% increase in maize production.

entities.name: SOUTHERN ASIA
entities.description: A sub-region of Asia that showed a 27.3% increase in maize production.

entities.name: EAST ASIA
entities.description: A sub-region of Asia that showed a 30.6% increase in maize production.

entities.name: PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total amount of a crop harvested globally or regionally.

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area.

entities.name: HARVESTED AREA
entities.description: The total land area used for harvesting a specific crop.
